subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 06/16] xlog: claim D_FAC3 as D_NETLINK

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch reclaims the debugging bit D_FAC3 and assigns it a new purpose as D_NETLINK, which is used for logging about netlink activity in the xlog module. This change is made because no other part of the codebase uses the original purpose of D_FAC3. The modification involves updating the definition of D_NETLINK in the include/xlog.h file.
